_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: Mean tumor volume at the end of experiments (day 68) were as follows: 90.7 (± 22.2 SD) mm³ in the placebo group (n = 10)...and 108.3 (± 34.1 SD) in the MEKi group (n = 10)
details: MEKi treatment showed no significant tumor volume reduction: mean volume 108.3 ± 34.1 mm³ vs placebo 90.7 ± 22.2 mm³ at day 68
